connection.offlineAria: The editor is used in offline mode, which means that you are the only one editing
connection.onlineAria: The editor is in collaborative mode via {type}, which means that you can share the URL and start editing with others
connection.switchOfflineAria: Turn off collaborative editing and switch to offline mode
connection.switchWebRTCAria: Switch to collaborative editing via WebRTC
connection.switchWebSocketAria: Switch to collaborative editing via Websocket

share.collaborationLinkTooltip: Fork this document before you can use this function
share.snapshotUrlAria: Share the current course with the editor
share.embedCodeAria: Get the embed code for the current course within the editor
share.externalResourceAria: Use an external document url for sharing with the editor
share.githubGistLinkTooltip: You have to export this file to GitHub gist before you can use this functionality
share.githubGistLinkAria: Load the LiaScript course from a previous export to GitHub gist
share.dataUriAria: Share the current course at LiaScript, with the content embedded into the URL
share.fileUrlTooltip: This function is only available if you have shared an external resource
share.downloadZip: Download the entire project in a zip file
share.githubGistAria: Store the document on GitHub as a gist
share.githubGistTooltip: Fork this document before you can use this function
share.nostrAria: Share the current content on Nostr

modal.collaborationBody: If you share the link below, the editor will be in collaborative mode. Working should also be possible offline, but all connected users will work on the same course. If you did receive this via a collaboration link and want to make a complete new course by yourself, then you will have to click onto the "Fork" button, which will create a complete new version.
modal.externalResourceBody: Use this URL to predefine the content for your share link. In this case the editor will at first try to load the Markdown file and insert its content into the editor. This link will only work if your Markdown file is accessible via the internet.
modal.dataProtocolBody: The entire content of the course is base64 encoded or URI-encoded put into a data-URI. Since base64 might fail for certain languages, the URI-encoded URL is generated as well. However, this works only for short courses, the longer the course the longer the URi. Sharing your editor via a messenger for example, you will have to check first if no parts are truncated! Additionally different browser support different lengths of URLs... (Choose the shorter version)
modal.snapshotBody: Snapshots are URLs that contain the entire course definition. However, this works only for short courses, the longer the course the longer the URL. Sharing your editor via a messenger for example, you will have to check first if no parts are truncated! Additionally different browser support different lengths of URLs...
modal.embedBody: Copy this HTML code into your website to embed this as an example. Optionally you can modify the URL with one of the following, to open the editor or the preview directly:

prompt.shareFileUrl: please insert the URL of a Markdown file you want to share

examples.footer: This is a collaborative online editor for {liascript}. All content is stored only within your browser. Search for embeddable {templates} or already published {courses}.

index.footer: This is a collaborative online editor for {liascript}. All content is stored only within your browser. If you need some inspiration, check out some of our {examples}, search for embeddable {templates}, or already published {courses}.

card.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this document forever?

toast.compileHint: You can modify and compile this course with {ctrl}, but if you want to store your changes permanently you have to fork it!
toast.compileHintEmbed: You can modify and compile this course with {ctrl}, or open it in the {link}.
toast.compileHintEmbedOnly: You can modify and compile this course with {ctrl}
toast.viewOnLiaScript: If you want to see the course on LiaScript, click {here}.
toast.toolbarHint: Use toolbar to switch between the editor and preview modes.

menu.importTooltip: Import files from a GitHub repository
menu.pushTooltip: Commit and push changes to the linked repository
menu.pullTooltip: Fetch changes from the linked repository

import.title: Import from GitHub
import.repoHint: Public repositories can be imported without a token.
import.truncated: This repository is very large; the file list was truncated by GitHub.

push.title: Push to GitHub
push.remoteDrift: The repository changed on GitHub since your last sync. Consider pulling first; unchanged remote files are preserved.

pull.title: Pull from GitHub
pull.upToDate: Your project is up to date with GitHub.

pat.intro: Add a Personal Access Token (PAT) to raise the rate limit and to access private repositories or push changes.
pat.howtoToggle: How do I create a token?
pat.step2: Choose a name and an expiration, then select the repositories you want to use.
pat.step3Write: Under "Repository permissions" set "Contents" to "Read and write".
pat.step4: Generate the token, copy it and paste it below.

errors.badUrl: Please enter a valid repository (owner/repo or a GitHub URL).
errors.notFound: Repository, branch or file not found.
errors.network: Could not reach GitHub. Please check your connection.

nostr.title: Share via Nostr
nostr.publicKeyHint: Your public key is used to identify you on the Nostr network.
nostr.privateKeyHint: Your private key is needed to sign and publish posts. Keep it secure.
nostr.storeCredentialsWarning: Storing your private key in the browser is convenient but less secure.
nostr.relayHint: Enter relay servers (one per line) to publish your content to.
nostr.rememberRelays: Remember these relays for future posts
nostr.saveKeyWarningBody: This private key gives access to your Nostr identity. Save it securely.
nostr.intro: Share your course with the Nostr community. You can publish directly or customize your post first.
nostr.embedMedia: Embed media files as data URIs
nostr.embedMediaHint: Converts images, audio, and video files to embedded data URIs for better portability.
nostr.messagePlaceholder: Add a message to accompany your Nostr post...
nostr.alertGenerateFailed: Failed to generate key pair. Please try again.
nostr.alertMissingKeys: Please enter both your public and private keys before publishing.
nostr.alertMissingRelay: Please enter at least one relay server.
nostr.alertPublishFailed: Failed to publish to Nostr network. Please try again.
nostr.alertMissingPrivateKey: Please provide your private key to sign and publish the post.

toolbar.noPreview: No preview available for this file type.
